page_metadata.biotools__summary: DbStRiPs (Database of structural repeats in proteins) is a structural repeat database which classifies a protein structure into a structural repeat family based on graph based structural repeat identification algorithm, PRIGSA2.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DbStRiPs (Database of structural repeats in proteins) is a structural repeat database which classifies a protein structure into a structural repeat family based on graph based structural repeat identification algorithm, PRIGSA2.
